title: Appendix #A-6 AFT Return Reason Codes
body_text:
Appendix #A-6	AFT Return Reason Codes
AFT Return Reason Code
Payments Canada Return Time Frame | Business Rules
901 ГўВЂВ“ NSF (Debit only)
1 business day
902 ГўВЂВ“ Account Not Found
1 business day
903 ГўВЂВ“ Payment Stopped/Recalled
1 business day
905 ГўВЂВ“ Account Closed
1 business day
907 ГўВЂВ“ No Debit Allowed
1 business day
908 ГўВЂВ“ Funds Not Cleared (Debit only)
1 business day
909 ГўВЂВ“ Currency/ Account Mismatch
1 business day
910 ГўВЂВ“ Payor/Payee Deceased
1 business day
911 ГўВЂВ“ Account Frozen
1 business day
912 ГўВЂВ“ Invalid/Incorrect Account Number
1 business day
914 ГўВЂВ“ Incorrect Payor/Payee Name
1 business day
915 ГўВЂВ“ No Agreement Existed ГўВЂВ“ Business/Personal
Business, Personal, Funds Transfer, Cash Management PADs ГўВЂВ“ 90 calendar days (debits only)
916 ГўВЂВ“ Not According to Agreement ГўВЂВ“ Personal
Personal, Funds Transfer PADs ГўВЂВ“ 90 calendar days (debits only). Funds Transfer PADs coded ГўВЂВњ650ГўВЂВќ or ГўВЂВњ83ГўВЂВќ cannot be returned for this reason.
917 ГўВЂВ“ Agreement Revoked ГўВЂВ“ Personal
Personal, Funds Transfer PADs ГўВЂВ“ 90 calendar days (debits only). Funds Transfer PADs coded ГўВЂВњ650ГўВЂВќ or ГўВЂВњ83ГўВЂВќ cannot be returned for this reason
918 ГўВЂВ“ No Confirmation/Pre-Notification ГўВЂВ“ Personal
Personal, Funds Transfer PADs ГўВЂВ“ 90 calendar days (debits only). Funds Transfer PADs coded ГўВЂВњ650ГўВЂВќ or ГўВЂВњ83ГўВЂВќ cannot be returned for this reason
919 ГўВЂВ“ Not According to Agreement ГўВЂВ“ Business
Business PADs ГўВЂВ“ 10 business days (debits only)
920 ГўВЂВ“ Agreement Revoked ГўВЂВ“ Business
Business PADs ГўВЂВ“ 10 business days (debits only)
921 ГўВЂВ“ No Confirmation/Pre-Notification ГўВЂВ“ Business
Business PADs ГўВЂВ“ 10 business days (debits only)
922 ГўВЂВ“ Customer Initiated Return
90 calendar days (credits only)
990 ГўВЂВ“ Institution in Default
1 business day
